golf_mk4_1998_2004_keyed.selection_note: Identify Immo2 or Immo3 and confirm cluster type before programming.

golf_mk5_2004_2009_keyed.selection_note: Identify the fitted cluster manufacturer and supported security-data route.

golf_mk6_2009_2013_keyed.selection_note: Do not choose between Challenge and later trade classifications by year alone.

golf_mk8_2020_present.selection_note: No universal aftermarket coverage claim; confirm VIN, key type and current tool support.
